message:
test(ftui-text): add 18 proptest invariants for text search utilities

Property-based tests covering search_exact, search_exact_overlapping,
and search_ascii_case_insensitive:
- Result ranges within bounds and at char boundaries
- Result text matches needle exactly
- Non-overlapping results don't overlap
- Overlapping search is superset of exact search
- Empty/long needle edge cases
- ASCII case-insensitive is superset of exact for lowercase
- Constructed occurrences are always found
- Results sorted by position
- Determinism
- No panics on arbitrary Unicode inputs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
